title: yg-fix workflow input
description: The confirmed findings report produced by the yg-review-salvage diagnosis workflow (or any audit that emits the same finding shape). This is the START input to the yg_fix workflow. The finding object is byte-compatible with the `findings` array in the diagnosis output.

findings.description: Every confirmed finding to attempt a fix for. Order is preserved; the workflow may cap the count via max_findings.

id.description: Stable finding id from the audit

recommendation.description: The concrete action the audit recommended

repo_root.description: Absolute path of the repo the fix agents operate in (e.g. /Users/tom/Developer/ablative/yggdrasil).

max_findings.description: Working-default cap on how many findings this run attempts (overridable). Slice the input yourself to target a severity band or the top-N.

max_fix_rounds.description: Bounded rework rounds when a reviewer blocks a fix. Default 1.
